spec.name: Under A Watchtower
spec.description: You stand under a tall watchtower. Narrow back alleys lead west and south and a very weak looking ladder leads up into the tower. Above you, you hear the screams of tens of starving lamias! Beware!

up.description: Winds howl high above your head in the tower above. You hear the screams of tens of howling lamias above you!
